inputs.label: Net Amount
inputs.businessContext: The net amount of goods or services before VAT. Based on standard tax accounting principles.

inputs.label: VAT Rate
inputs.businessContext: VAT rate category as per local tax regulations. Standard rates vary by country (e.g., 20% in UK, 19% in Germany).

inputs.label: VAT Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Custom VAT percentage if not using standard rates. Used for specific products or jurisdictions.

inputs.label: Reverse Charge Applicable
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if reverse charge mechanism applies (B2B transactions in certain sectors). Based on EU VAT Directive.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for the transaction. Used for multi-currency reporting.

rules: if isReverseCharge == true then vatRate == 'standard' or vatRate == 'reduced'

thresholds.vatPercentage: if vatPercentage > 25 then 'Unusually high VAT rate'

hiddenLossDrivers: if vatRate == 'exempt' then 'No VAT recovery possible'
if isReverseCharge then 'VAT accounted by recipient'
suggestedActions: if isReverseCharge then 'Ensure correct invoicing for reverse charge'
